title: Hampfrey's CIT
description: A moderate collection of CIT weapons for use with Optifine
body:
This pack requires optifine!

To use in game rename the corresponding tool to it's name. Hopefully any confusing items will have a tag to explain what they use as a base. If I've messed up please message me.

The items included are as follows...

Stone
- Stone Dual Blade

Iron
- Iron Blade
- Iron Claymore
- Iron Dagger
- Iron Dual Blade
- Iron Hammer (Axe)
- Iron Great Axe
- Iron Rapier
- Iron Spork
- Iron War Axe
- Thors Blessing

Golden
- Alysium
- Golden Blade
- Golden Dagger
- Golden Dual Blade
- Golden Great Sword
- Golden Hammer (Axe)
- Golden War Axe

Diamond
- Diamond Battle Axe
- Diamond Blade
- Diamond Doom (Axe)
- Diamond Dual Blade
- Diamond Rapier
- Diamond War Axe

Netherite
- Flame Saw
- Fury
- Netherite Battle Axe
- Netherite Blade
- Netherite Claymore
- Netherite Dual Blade
- Netherite Great Sword
- Netherite Mace (Axe)
- Netherite Sickle

Diamond & Netherite
- Antlion Axe
- Antlion Hoe
- Antlion Pickaxe
- Antlion Shovel
- Antlions Wrath
- Axeblade
- Chicken Reaper (Sword)
- Combat Hoe (Hoe)
- Grand Wraith
- Light Axe
- Light Hoe
- Light Pickaxe
- Light Shovel
- Light Thief
- Reef
- Royal Axe
- Royal Claymore
- Royal Hoe
- Royal Pickaxe
- Royal Shovel
- Royal Sword
- Shattered Soul
- Steampunk Hammer (Axe)
- Xenobasher

Crossbows
- Antlion Crossbow
- Diamond Crossbow
- Handheld Ballista
- Iron Crossbow
- Micro Crossbow

Bows
- Call Of The Chicken
- Inferno
- Light Bow
- Mechanical Greatbow
- Twig Bow

Shields
- Antlion Shield
- Light Shield
- Royal Shield

Heavy Armor
- Heavy Diamond Helmet
- Heavy Diamond Chestplate
- Heavy Golden Helmet
- Heavy Golden Chestplate
- Heavy Iron Helmet
- Heavy Iron Chestplate
- Heaby Netherite Helmet
- Heaby Netherite Chestplate

Invisible Armors, all iron, golden, diamond, and netherite armor can be renamed to "invisible" to turn it invisible, great for when you want to see your skin more :3

This pack also changes the default shield to match the model inaccuracy of my shields, and the default armors are also changed to color match, the main version also changes a couple other items like the stick, shield, bowls, etc. to having matching wood colors and buckets.

The default tool textures were heavily based on those of I_am_Merp's Brush-Up with only minimal changes. Check out Brush-Up here! https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/brush-up

Check out Regal Bones's stuff! https://regal-bones.tumblr.com/
